result.notes:

CLASSIFICATION SOURCE: The 1044 runtime keys were already classified into 6 categories in docs/review_readiness/config_governance.md and the machine-readable /home/polaris/wt/phase1/baseline/config_keys_classified.json. Verified counts sum exactly to 1044: model-selection 35, secret 97, internal-flag 71, tuning-threshold 372, internal-other 434, external/system 35. Domains: PG_* 1005, OPENROUTER_* 7, other/external 32.

OWNER-ROLE ASSIGNMENT (by category, not per-key): OWNER (project owner, accountable) = 215 keys = model-selection (35) + secret (97) + a cross-cutting faithfulness/verification override (83) that promotes any key matching FAITH|NLI|ENTAIL|VERIF|CONTRADICT|SENTINEL|JUDGE out of tuning-threshold(26)/internal-flag(3)/internal-other(54). EXECUTOR (engineering, owner sign-off) = 829 keys = tuning-threshold(346 after override) + internal-flag(68) + internal-other(380) + external/system(35). 215+829=1044, every key exactly one role.

PRECEDENCE (referenced from Phase 1B, characterized/test-locked): uniformly process-env (os.environ) > .env > default, case-sensitive on the exact PG_ name. Registry-backed 871 keys via settings.resolve() = os.getenv(key, CONFIG_DEFAULTS[key]) locked by tests/test_config_registry.py; the 12 model keys via ModelSettings validation_alias=PG_* locked by tests/test_settings_models.py; remaining tail (secret-shaped, computed/multiline, 20 conflicting-default in config_conflicts.md) still read via call-site os.getenv with the same precedence.

GATE: 100% classified (1044/1044) + owned (1044/1044 by category) + precedence documented -> MET, stated explicitly in the doc.

NO RUNTIME CHANGE CONFIRMED: git status shows only the single new untracked/committed file docs/review_readiness/config_ownership.md; grep confirms zero src/, tests/, or .py changes.
